heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 3510 Authorization of appropriations
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was classified to prior to repeal by .section 10 of Pub. L. 97–348section 3509 of this titlePub. L. 106–514

Amendments2024— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “There is authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary to carry out this chapter $2,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2006 through 2010.”Pub. L. 118–1172006— substituted “2006 through 2010” for “2001, 2002, 2003, 2004, and 2005”.Pub. L. 109–2262000— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary for carrying out this chapter $2,000,000 for each of fiscal years 1995 to 1998.”Pub. L. 106–5141994— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “There is authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary for carrying out this chapter not more than $1,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 1990, 1991, 1992, and 1993.”Pub. L. 103–4611990— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “There is authorized to be appropriated to the Department of the Interior $1,000,000 for the period beginning , and ending , for purposes of carrying out sections 3503 and 3509 of this title.”Pub. L. 101–591October 1, 1982September 30, 1985
